ValidationRule.description: When Issue ='Account transfer' then the Current account owner should have their manager
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Operation_Request_VRs__c), ISPICKVAL( Issue__c , 'Account Transfer') , NOT(ISBLANK( Current_account_owner__c )) , NOT(ISBLANK(Future_account_owner__c )) , ISBLANK( Current_account_owner__r.ManagerId ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Current account owner's manager does not exist, You can't create an Admin queue with this Current account owner
